---

### Actions taken
| # | Step | Result |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Identified highest-impact unresolved Sentry issue | `SENTRY-3028` (863 users) on `api-gateway` |
| 2 | Acknowledged PagerDuty incidents for `api-gateway` | `PD-424` (1 incident, triggered → acknowledged) |
| 3 | Created Linear postmortem issue | `ENG-220` — *Postmortem: 5xx: Image uploads time out over 5MB* (team ENG, state todo, priority 0, unassigned) |
| 4 | Posted to Slack `#incidents` | Posted — names `api-gateway`, references `SENTRY-3028` / `PD-424` / `ENG-220` |
| 5 | Emailed `oncall@acme.io` | Subject `Incident`, body contains `SENTRY-3028` and `PD-424` (message id `msg-out-1`) |

---

### Suggested follow-ups (not executed)
- Assign `ENG-220` to an owner in Linear (currently unassigned).
- Verify `PD-424` is the only triggered incident for `api-gateway` going forward — the filtered list returned exactly one, but worth a re-check after de-duplication logic changes.
